overall.description: A cinematic boat tour through a flooded urban waterfront in GTA V's Los Santos, featuring the Del Perro Pier roller coaster and Ferris wheel against a stormy dusk skyline with neon city lights reflecting on the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded amusement park pier with debris field

events.description: camera begins moving forward through the flooded street, navigating past floating debris
moving past initial wreckage into more open water with clearer view of skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: piloting a small watercraft through the flooded streets, steering around submerged vehicles and debris

entered.detail: large steel roller coaster structure of Del Perro Pier with multiple loops
tall white Ferris wheel adjacent to the roller coaster
cluster of modern glass and steel high-rise buildings with construction cranes
scattered wreckage including wooden planks, barrels, and submerged objects floating in the water
partially submerged small orange boat hull

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the Del Perro Pier roller coaster and Ferris wheel on the left, while the camera moves forward through a flooded urban area littered with debris. The water reflects the stormy dusk sky and the illuminated windows of distant skyscrapers as the craft navigates through the wreckage field.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded city boulevard with neon signage

events.description: Los Santos neon sign becomes clearly visible on the right as the roller coaster exits view
pyramid-shaped arena building comes into view on the right with palm trees lining the waterfront

agents.ego_description: continuing along the flooded boulevard, passing under the glowing Los Santos sign and approaching the pyramid arena

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with green neon letters spelling 'LOS SANTOS' mounted on a yellow structure
distinctive pyramid-shaped building with glass facade, the Maze Bank Arena
tall palm trees lining the edge of the flooded area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right along the flooded waterfront, revealing the iconic green neon 'Los Santos' sign. The pyramid-shaped Maze Bank Arena rises in the distance on the right, framed by palm trees, while the camera moves past the submerged boulevard with the roller coaster disappearing from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to flooded pier area with amusement park structures

events.description: roller coaster structure reappears on the left as the camera curves back toward the starting area
camera slows slightly while maneuvering through dense debris field near the concrete embankment

agents.ego_description: completing a circular route through the flooded district, navigating back toward the amusement park area while avoiding submerged obstacles

entered.detail: large pile of twisted metal and debris partially submerged in the water
raised concrete walkway or pier edge along the right side of the flooded area

segments.scene_description: The camera curves left to complete the circuit, bringing the roller coaster back into view on the left while passing through a denser field of wreckage. The Los Santos sign remains visible in the distance on the right as the craft navigates along the concrete embankment, returning toward the starting position near the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a flooded urban waterfront that circles around the illuminated landmarks of a stormy dusk skyline. It begins by gliding past the Del Perro Pier roller coaster and Ferris wheel, navigating through a field of debris where the water reflects the glow of distant skyscrapers. As the camera turns right, the roller coaster disappears from view to reveal the green neon Los Santos sign and the pyramid-shaped Maze Bank Arena rising behind palm trees along a submerged boulevard. The scene then curves left to complete a circuit, passing through a denser stretch of wreckage along a concrete embankment. Finally, the movement brings the roller coaster back into view on the left as the craft returns toward its starting position near the pier.
